context: Tests whether the agent pushes back on a vague 'looks solid' approval by asking about the weakest part and the fallback — and flags under-engineering by naming specific missing concerns, describing production failure scenarios, and quantifying the cost of fixing them later.

checklist.name: Rejects vague approval
checklist.description: review.md does NOT accept 'looks solid' or equivalent as sufficient — it explicitly asks for more specific confirmation

checklist.name: Asks about weakest part
checklist.description: review.md asks specifically whether the user is comfortable with the weakest part of the proposal, or names the weakest point and asks about it

checklist.name: Asks about fallback
checklist.description: review.md asks what the fallback is if a specific risk materializes

checklist.name: Flags missing auth/security
checklist.description: review.md flags the absence of authentication, authorization, or access control as a production concern

checklist.name: Flags missing monitoring
checklist.description: review.md flags the absence of monitoring, logging, or alerting as a production concern

checklist.name: Production failure scenario
checklist.description: review.md describes a specific scenario in which at least one of the missing concerns becomes a production incident

checklist.name: Cost of fixing later
checklist.description: review.md states that the cost of addressing the missing concern later is significantly higher than addressing it now (or quantifies the risk)

checklist.name: Does not approve the design
checklist.description: review.md does NOT ultimately validate the design as ready to build despite the missing concerns
